task.seed: Use Meta-Skill to clean the proposed writing skill payload in fixtures/fixtures/contaminated-skill.md. Return concise patch guidance: what should stay in runtime, what should move out, and what validation should run. Do not rewrite the entire skill.

expectations: The response identifies the task as a payload hygiene or Clean-mode cleanup of an existing skill.
The response preserves reusable draft and rewrite behavior as runtime guidance.
The response moves source provenance, prompt-role language, local paths, thread ids, rejected names, and research-history notes out of portable runtime.
The response recommends validation beyond structural lint when semantic payload quality is at risk.
